verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Ezechias regnare cœpit, cum viginti quinque esset annorum, et viginti novem annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Abia filia Zachariæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְחִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ מָלַ֗ךְ בֶּן־עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וְחָמֵשׁ֙ שָׁנָ֔ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֤ים וָתֵ֙שַׁע֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ אֲבִיָּ֖ה בַּת־זְכַרְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now Ezechias began to reign, when he was five and twenty years old, and he reigned nine and twenty years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Abia, the daughter of Zacharias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jehiskia oli viiden ajastaikainen kolmattakymmentä tullessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi yhdeksänkolmattakymmentä ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa. Ja hänen äitinsä nimi oli Abia Sakarian tytär.
verses.king_james: Hezekiah began to reign when he was five and twenty years old, and he reigned nine and twenty years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Abijah, the daughter of Zechariah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod erat placitum in conspectu Domini, juxta omnia quæ fecerat David pater ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֖ה דָּוִ֥יד אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was pleasing in the sight of the Lord, according to all that David his father had done.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki, mitä Herralle oli otollinen, kaiketi niinkuin hänen isänsä David.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was right in the sight of the Lord, according to all that David his father had done.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse, anno et mense primo regni sui, aperuit valvas domus Domini, et instauravit eas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וּא בַשָּׁנָה֩ הָרִאשׁוֹנָ֨ה לְמׇלְכ֜וֹ בַּחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֗וֹן פָּתַ֛ח אֶת־דַּלְת֥וֹת בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה וַֽיְחַזְּקֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the first year and month of his reign he opened the doors of the house of the Lord, and repaired them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän avasi Herran huoneen ovet ensimäisenä valtakuntansa kuukautena ensimäisenä vuonna, ja vahvisti ne.
verses.king_james: He in the first year of his reign, in the first month, opened the doors of the house of the Lord, and repaired them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adduxitque sacerdotes atque Levitas, et congregavit eos in plateam orientalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֵ֥א אֶת־הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְאֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֑ם וַיַּאַסְפֵ֖ם לִרְח֥וֹב הַמִּזְרָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought the priests and the Levites, and assembled them in the east street.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja saatti papit ja Leviläiset sinne, ja kokosi heidät itäiselle kadulle,
verses.king_james: And he brought in the priests and the Levites, and gathered them together into the east street,

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad eos : Audite me, Levitæ, et sanctificamini : mundate domum Domini Dei patrum vestrorum, et auferte omnem immunditiam de sanctuario.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר לָהֶ֖ם שְׁמָע֣וּנִי הַלְוִיִּ֑ם עַתָּ֣ה הִֽתְקַדְּשׁ֗וּ וְקַדְּשׁוּ֙ אֶת־בֵּ֤ית יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י אֲבֹתֵיכֶ֔ם וְהוֹצִ֥יאוּ אֶת־הַנִּדָּ֖ה מִן־הַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to them: Hear me, ye Levites, and be sanctified, purify the house of the Lord the God of your fathers, and take away all filth out of the sanctuary.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi heille: kuulkaat minua Leviläiset: pyhittäkäät nyt teitänne, ja pyhittäkäät Herran teidän isäinne Jumalan huone, ja kantakaat saastaisuus ulos pyhästä!
verses.king_james: And said unto them, Hear me, ye Levites, sanctify now yourselves, and sanctify the house of the Lord God of your fathers, and carry forth the filthiness out of the holy place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccaverunt patres nostri, et fecerunt malum in conspectu Domini Dei nostri, derelinquentes eum : averterunt facies suas a tabernaculo Domini, et præbuerunt dorsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־מָעֲל֣וּ אֲבֹתֵ֗ינוּ וְעָשׂ֥וּ הָרַ֛ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה־אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ וַיַּעַזְבֻ֑הוּ וַיַּסֵּ֧בּוּ פְנֵיהֶ֛ם מִמִּשְׁכַּ֥ן יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיִּתְּנוּ־עֹֽרֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our fathers have sinned and done evil in the sight of the Lord God, forsaking him: they have turned away their faces from the tabernacle of the Lord, and turned their backs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä meidän isämme ovat menetelleet väärin, ja tehneet pahaa Herran Jumalamme edessä, ja hyljänneet hänen; sillä he ovat kasvonsa kääntäneet pois Herran majasta, ja kääntäneet selkänsä sen puoleen;
verses.king_james: For our fathers have trespassed, and done that which was evil in the eyes of the Lord our God, and have forsaken him, and have turned away their faces from the habitation of the Lord, and turned their backs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clauserunt ostia quæ erant in porticu, et extinxerunt lucernas, incensumque non adoleverunt, et holocausta non obtulerunt in sanctuario Deo Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֣ם סָגְר֞וּ דַּלְת֣וֹת הָאוּלָ֗ם וַיְכַבּוּ֙ אֶת־הַנֵּר֔וֹת וּקְטֹ֖רֶת לֹ֣א הִקְטִ֑ירוּ וְעֹלָה֙ לֹא־הֶעֱל֣וּ בַקֹּ֔דֶשׁ לֵאלֹהֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have shut up the doors that were in the porch, and put out the lamps, and have not burnt incense, nor offered holocausts in the sanctuary of the God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ovat myös sulkeneet esihuoneen ovet, ja sammuttaneet lamput, ja ei suitsuttaneet suitsutusta, eikä uhranneet polttouhria Israelin Jumalalle pyhässä.
verses.king_james: Also they have shut up the doors of the porch, and put out the lamps, and have not burned incense nor offered burnt offerings in the holy place unto the God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concitatus est itaque furor Domini super Judam et Jerusalem, tradiditque eos in commotionem, et in interitum, et in sibilum, sicut ipsi cernitis oculis vestris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ קֶ֣צֶף יְהֹוָ֔ה עַל־יְהוּדָ֖ה וִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַיִּתְּנֵ֤ם (לזועה) [לְזַעֲוָה֙] לְשַׁמָּ֣ה וְלִשְׁרֵקָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר אַתֶּ֥ם רֹאִ֖ים בְּעֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore the wrath of the Lord hath been stirred up against Juda and Jerusalem, and he hath delivered them to trouble, and to destruction, and to be hissed at, as you see with your eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siitä on Herran viha Juudan ja Jerusalemin päälle tullut, ja on antanut heidän hämmästykseksi ja hävitykseksi, ja viheltämiseksi, niinkuin te näette silmillänne.
verses.king_james: Wherefore the wrath of the Lord was upon Judah and Jerusalem, and he hath delivered them to trouble, to astonishment, and to hissing, as ye see with your eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: En corruerunt patres nostri gladiis : filii nostri, et filiæ nostræ, et conjuges captivæ ductæ sunt propter hoc scelus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֛ה נָפְל֥וּ אֲבוֹתֵ֖ינוּ בֶּחָ֑רֶב וּבָנֵ֨ינוּ וּבְנוֹתֵ֧ינוּ וְנָשֵׁ֛ינוּ בַּשְּׁבִ֖י עַל־זֹֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold, our fathers are fallen by the sword, our sons, and our daughters, and wives are led away captives for this wickedness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä katso, sentähden ovat meidän isämme langenneet miekan kautta, meidän poikamme, tyttäremme ja emäntämme ovat viedyt pois.
verses.king_james: For, lo, our fathers have fallen by the sword, and our sons and our daughters and our wives are in captivity for this.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo placet mihi ut ineamus fœdus cum Domino Deo Israël, et avertet a nobis furorem iræ suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּה֙ עִם־לְבָבִ֔י לִכְר֣וֹת בְּרִ֔ית לַיהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְיָשֹׁ֥ב מִמֶּ֖נּוּ חֲר֥וֹן אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now therefore I have a mind that we make a covenant with the Lord the God of Israel, and he will turn away the wrath of his indignation from us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt olen minä aikonut tehdä Herran Israelin Jumalan kanssa liiton, että hän vihansa hirmuisuuden kääntäis meidän päältämme pois.
verses.king_james: Now it is in mine heart to make a covenant with the Lord God of Israel, that his fierce wrath may turn away from us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii mei, nolite negligere : vos elegit Dominus ut stetis coram eo, et ministretis illi, colatisque eum, et cremetis ei incensum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּנַ֕י עַתָּ֖ה אַל־תִּשָּׁל֑וּ כִּֽי־בָכֶ֞ם בָּחַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה לַעֲמֹ֤ד לְפָנָיו֙ לְשָׁ֣רְת֔וֹ וְלִהְי֥וֹת ל֖וֹ מְשָׁרְתִ֥ים וּמַקְטִרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: My sons, be not negligent: the Lord hath chosen you to stand before him, and to minister to him, and to worship him, and to burn incense to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt minun poikani, älkäät siekailko; sillä Herra on teidät valinnut seisomaan edessänsä palveluksessa, ja olemaan hänen palveliansa, ja suitsuttamaan.
verses.king_james: My sons, be not now negligent: for the Lord hath chosen you to stand before him, to serve him, and that ye should minister unto him, and burn incense.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexerunt ergo Levitæ : Mahath filius Amasai, et Joël filius Azariæ de filiis Caath : porro de filiis Merari, Cis filius Abdi, et Azarias filius Jalaleel. De filiis autem Gersom, Joah filius Zemma, et Eden filius Joah.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּקֻ֣מוּ הַ֠לְוִיִּ֠ם מַ֣חַת בֶּן־עֲמָשַׂ֞י וְיוֹאֵ֣ל בֶּן־עֲזַרְיָ֘הוּ֮ מִן־בְּנֵ֣י הַקְּהָתִי֒ וּמִן־בְּנֵ֣י מְרָרִ֔י קִ֚ישׁ בֶּן־עַבְדִּ֔י וַעֲזַרְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־יְהַלֶּלְאֵ֑ל {ס} וּמִן־הַגֵּ֣רְשֻׁנִּ֔י יוֹאָח֙ בֶּן־זִמָּ֔ה וְעֵ֖דֶן בֶּן־יוֹאָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the Levites arose, Mahath the son of Amasai, and Joel the son of Azarias, of the sons of Caath: and of the sons of Merari, Cis the son of Abdi, and Azarias the son of Jalaleel. And of the sons of Gerson, Joah the son of Zemma, and Eden the son of Joah.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nousivat Leviläiset: Mahat Amasain poika, ja Joel Asarian poika Kahatilaisten lapsista; ja Merarin lapsista: Kis Abdin poika, ja Atsaria Jahalleleelin poika; ja Gersonilaisista: Joa Simman poika, ja Eden Joan poika;
verses.king_james: Then the Levites arose, Mahath the son of Amasai, and Joel the son of Azariah, of the sons of the Kohathites: and of the sons of Merari, Kish the son of Abdi, and Azariah the son of Jehalelel: and of the Gershonites; Joah the son of Zimmah, and Eden the son of Joah:

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero de filiis Elisaphan, Samri, et Jahiel. De filiis quoque Asaph, Zacharias, et Mathanias :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִן־בְּנֵי֙ אֱלִ֣יצָפָ֔ן שִׁמְרִ֖י (ויעואל) [וִיעִיאֵ֑ל] וּמִן־בְּנֵ֣י אָסָ֔ף זְכַרְיָ֖הוּ וּמַתַּנְיָֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Elisaphan, Samri, and Jahiel. Also of the sons of Asaph, Zacharias, and Mathanias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Elitsaphanin lapsista: Simri ja Jejel; Asaphin lapsista: Zakaria ja Mattania;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Elizaphan; Shimri, and Jeiel: and of the sons of Asaph; Zechariah, and Mattaniah:

verses.latin_vulgate: necnon de filiis Heman, Jahiel, et Semei : sed et de filiis Idithun, Semeias, et Oziel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִן־בְּנֵ֥י הֵימָ֖ן (יחואל) [יְחִיאֵ֣ל] וְשִׁמְעִ֑י {ס} וּמִן־בְּנֵ֣י יְדוּת֔וּן שְׁמַֽעְיָ֖ה וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Heman, Jahiel, and Semei: and of the sons of Idithun, Semeias, and Oziel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hemanin lapsista: Jehiel ja Simei; Jedutunin lapsista: Semaja ja Ussiel.
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregaveruntque fratres suos, et sanctificati sunt, et ingressi sunt juxta mandatum regis et imperium Domini, ut expiarent domum Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּאַסְפ֤וּ אֶת־אֲחֵיהֶם֙ וַיִּֽתְקַדְּשׁ֔וּ וַיָּבֹ֥אוּ כְמִצְוַת־הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ בְּדִבְרֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה לְטַהֵ֖ר בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they gathered together their brethren, and sanctified themselves, and went in according to the commandment of the king, and the precept of the Lord, to purify the house of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kokosivat veljensä ja pyhittivät itsensä, ja menivät kuninkaan käskystä Herran sanan jälkeen puhdistamaan Herran huonetta.
verses.king_james: And they gathered their brethren, and sanctified themselves, and came, according to the commandment of the king, by the words of the Lord, to cleanse the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes quoque ingressi templum Domini ut sanctificarent illud, extulerunt omnem immunditiam quam intro repererant in vestibulo domus Domini : quam tulerunt Levitæ, et asportaverunt ad torrentem Cedron foras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ הַ֠כֹּהֲנִ֠ים לִפְנִ֣ימָה בֵית־יְהֹוָה֮ לְטַהֵר֒ וַיּוֹצִ֗יאוּ אֵ֤ת כׇּל־הַטֻּמְאָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר מָֽצְאוּ֙ בְּהֵיכַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֔ה לַחֲצַ֖ר בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וַֽיְקַבְּלוּ֙ הַלְוִיִּ֔ם לְהוֹצִ֥יא לְנַחַל־קִדְר֖וֹן חֽוּצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests went into the temple of the Lord to sanctify it, and brought out all the uncleanness that they found within to the entrance of the house of the Lord, and the Levites took it away, and carried it out abroad to the torrent Cedron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit menivät sisälle Herran huoneesen puhdistamaan sitä, ja kantoivat ulos kaiken saastaisuuden, jonka löysivät Herran templistä, Herran huoneen kartanolle. Ja Leviläiset ottivat sen ja kantoivat Kidronin ojaan.
verses.king_james: And the priests went into the inner part of the house of the Lord, to cleanse it, and brought out all the uncleanness that they found in the temple of the Lord into the court of the house of the Lord. And the Levites took it, to carry it out abroad into the brook Kidron.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cœperunt autem prima die mensis primi mundare, et in die octavo ejusdem mensis ingressi sunt porticum templi Domini, expiaveruntque templum diebus octo, et in die sextadecima mensis ejusdem, quod cœperant, impleverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יָּחֵ֠לּוּ בְּאֶחָ֞ד לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁוֹן֮ לְקַדֵּשׁ֒ וּבְי֧וֹם שְׁמוֹנָ֣ה לַחֹ֗דֶשׁ בָּ֚אוּ לְאוּלָ֣ם יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיְקַדְּשׁ֥וּ אֶת־בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה לְיָמִ֣ים שְׁמוֹנָ֑ה וּבְי֨וֹם שִׁשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֛ר לַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֖וֹן כִּלּֽוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they began to cleanse on the first day of the first month, and on the eighth day of the same month they came into the porch of the temple of the Lord, and they purified the temple in eight days, and on the sixteenth day of the same month they finished what they had begun.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäisenä päivänä ensimäisestä kuusta rupesivat he pyhittämään itseänsä, ja kahdeksantena päivänä siitä kuusta menivät he Herran esihuoneesen ja pyhittivät Herran huonetta kahdeksan päivää, ja päättivät sen kuudentena toistakymmentä ensimäisellä kuulla.
verses.king_james: Now they began on the first day of the first month to sanctify, and on the eighth day of the month came they to the porch of the Lord: so they sanctified the house of the Lord in eight days; and in the sixteenth day of the first month they made an end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingressi quoque sunt ad Ezechiam regem, et dixerunt ei : Sanctificavimus omnem domum Domini, et altare holocausti, vasaque ejus, necnon et mensam propositionis cum omnibus vasis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּב֤וֹאֽוּ פְנִ֙ימָה֙ אֶל־חִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ טִהַ֖רְנוּ אֶת־כׇּל־בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה אֶת־מִזְבַּ֤ח הָעוֹלָה֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־כֵּלָ֔יו וְאֶת־שֻׁלְחַ֥ן הַֽמַּעֲרֶ֖כֶת וְאֶת־כׇּל־כֵּלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they went in to king Ezechias, and said to him: We have sanctified all the house of the Lord, and the altar of holocaust, and the vessels thereof, and the table of proposition with all its vessels,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he menivät sisälle kuningas Jehiskian tykö ja sanoivat: me olemme puhdistaneet kaiken Herran huoneen ja polttouhrin alttarin, ja kaikki sen astiat, ja näkyleipäin pöydän ja kaikki sen astiat;
verses.king_james: Then they went in to Hezekiah the king, and said, We have cleansed all the house of the Lord, and the altar of burnt offering, with all the vessels thereof, and the shewbread table, with all the vessels thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: cunctamque templi supellectilem, quam polluerat rex Achaz in regno suo, postquam prævaricatus est : et ecce exposita sunt omnia coram altare Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣ת כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִזְנִ֩יחַ֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ אָחָ֧ז בְּמַלְכוּת֛וֹ בְּמַעֲל֖וֹ הֵכַ֣נּוּ וְהִקְדָּ֑שְׁנוּ וְהִנָּ֕ם לִפְנֵ֖י מִזְבַּ֥ח יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And all the furniture of the temple, which king Achaz in his reign had defiled, after his transgression; and behold they are all set forth before the altar of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki myös ne astiat, jotka kuningas Ahas oli hyljännyt kuninkaana olessansa, koska hän väärin teki, ne olemme me valmistaneet ja pyhittäneet: ja katso, ne ovat Herran alttarin edessä.
verses.king_james: Moreover all the vessels, which king Ahaz in his reign did cast away in his transgression, have we prepared and sanctified, and, behold, they are before the altar of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consurgensque diluculo Ezechias rex, adunavit omnes principes civitatis, et ascendit in domum Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁכֵּם֙ יְחִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וַיֶּאֱסֹ֕ף אֵ֖ת שָׂרֵ֣י הָעִ֑יר וַיַּ֖עַל בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Ezechias rising early, assembled all the rulers of the city, and went up into the house of the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas Jehiskia nousi varhain aamulla ja kokosi kaupungin ylimmäiset, ja meni Herran huoneesen.
verses.king_james: Then Hezekiah the king rose early, and gathered the rulers of the city, and went up to the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: obtuleruntque simul tauros septem, et arietes septem, agnos septem, et hircos septem pro peccato, pro regno, pro sanctuario, pro Juda : dixitque sacerdotibus filiis Aaron, ut offerrent super altare Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֣יאוּ פָֽרִים־שִׁבְעָה֩ וְאֵילִ֨ים שִׁבְעָ֜ה וּכְבָשִׂ֣ים שִׁבְעָ֗ה וּצְפִירֵ֨י עִזִּ֤ים שִׁבְעָה֙ לְחַטָּ֔את עַל־הַמַּמְלָכָ֥ה וְעַל־הַמִּקְדָּ֖שׁ וְעַל־יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לִבְנֵ֤י אַֽהֲרֹן֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים לְהַעֲל֖וֹת עַל־מִזְבַּ֥ח יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they offered together seven bullocks, and seven rams, and seven lambs, and seven he goats for sin, for the kingdom, for the sanctuary, for Juda: and he spoke to the priests the sons of Aaron, to offer them upon the altar of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja toivat seitsemän mullia, ja seitsemän oinasta, ja seitsemän karitsaa, ja seitsemän kaurista syntiuhriksi, valtakunnan edestä, pyhän edestä, ja Juudan edestä. Ja hän sanoi papeille Aaronin lapsille, että he uhraisivat ne Herran alttarilla.
verses.king_james: And they brought seven bullocks, and seven rams, and seven lambs, and seven he goats, for a sin offering for the kingdom, and for the sanctuary, and for Judah. And he commanded the priests the sons of Aaron to offer them on the altar of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mactaverunt igitur tauros, et susceperunt sanguinem sacerdotes, et fuderunt illum super altare : mactaverunt etiam arietes, et illorum sanguinem super altare fuderunt, immolaveruntque agnos, et fuderunt super altare sanguinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּשְׁחֲטוּ֙ הַבָּקָ֔ר וַיְקַבְּל֤וּ הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ אֶת־הַדָּ֔ם וַֽיִּזְרְק֖וּ הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חָה וַיִּשְׁחֲט֣וּ הָאֵלִ֗ים וַיִּזְרְק֤וּ הַדָּם֙ הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חָה וַֽיִּשְׁחֲטוּ֙ הַכְּבָשִׂ֔ים וַיִּזְרְק֥וּ הַדָּ֖ם הַמִּזְבֵּֽחָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore they killed the bullocks, and the priests took the blood, and poured it upon the altar; they killed also the rams, and their blood they poured also upon the altar, and they killed the lambs, and poured the blood upon the altar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he teurastivat härjät, ja papit ottivat veren ja priiskottivat alttarille; ja he teurastivat oinaat ja priiskottivat veren alttarille, ja teurastivat myös karitsat ja priiskottivat veren alttarille;
verses.king_james: So they killed the bullocks, and the priests received the blood, and sprinkled it on the altar: likewise, when they had killed the rams, they sprinkled the blood upon the altar: they killed also the lambs, and they sprinkled the blood upon the altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Applicuerunt hircos pro peccato coram rege, et universa multitudine, imposueruntque manus suas super eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגִּ֙ישׁוּ֙ אֶת־שְׂעִירֵ֣י הַחַטָּ֔את לִפְנֵ֥י הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ וְהַקָּהָ֑ל וַיִּסְמְכ֥וּ יְדֵיהֶ֖ם עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they brought the he goats for sin before the king, and the whole multitude, and they laid their hand upon them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja toivat kauriit syntiuhriksi kuninkaan ja seurakunnan eteen, ja panivat kätensä niiden päälle.
verses.king_james: And they brought forth the he goats for the sin offering before the king and the congregation; and they laid their hands upon them:

verses.latin_vulgate: et immolaverunt illos sacerdotes, et asperserunt sanguinem eorum coram altare pro piaculo universi Israëlis : pro omni quippe Israël præceperat rex ut holocaustum fieret, et pro peccato.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁחָטוּם֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים וַֽיְחַטְּא֤וּ אֶת־דָּמָם֙ הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חָה לְכַפֵּ֖ר עַל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּ֤י לְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אָמַ֣ר הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ הָעוֹלָ֖ה וְהַחַטָּֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests immolated them, and sprinkled their blood before the altar for an expiation of all Israel: for the king had commanded that the holocaust and the sin offering should be made for all Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit teurastivat ne ja priiskottivat veren alttarille, sovittamaan kaikkea Israelia; sillä kuningas oli heidän käskenyt uhrata polttouhrin ja syntiuhrin kaiken Israelin edestä.
verses.king_james: And the priests killed them, and they made reconciliation with their blood upon the altar, to make an atonement for all Israel: for the king commanded that the burnt offering and the sin offering should be made for all Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituit quoque Levitas in domo Domini cum cymbalis, et psalteriis, et citharis secundum dispositionem David regis, et Gad videntis, et Nathan prophetæ : siquidem Domini præceptum fuit per manum prophetarum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמֵ֨ד אֶת־הַלְוִיִּ֜ם בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֗ה בִּמְצִלְתַּ֙יִם֙ בִּנְבָלִ֣ים וּבְכִנֹּר֔וֹת בְּמִצְוַ֥ת דָּוִ֛יד וְגָ֥ד חֹזֵֽה־הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ וְנָתָ֣ן הַנָּבִ֑יא כִּ֧י בְיַד־יְהֹוָ֛ה הַמִּצְוָ֖ה בְּיַד־נְבִיאָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he set the Levites in the house of the Lord with cymbals, and psalteries, and harps according to the regulation of David the king, and of Gad the seer, and of Nathan the prophet: for it was the commandment of the Lord by the hand of his prophets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän asetti Leviläiset Herran huoneesen symbaleilla, psaltareilla ja harpuilla, niinkuin David käskenyt oli ja Gad kuninkaan näkiä, ja Natan propheta; sillä se oli Herran käsky hänen prophetainsa kautta.
verses.king_james: And he set the Levites in the house of the Lord with cymbals, with psalteries, and with harps, according to the commandment of David, and of Gad the king’s seer, and Nathan the prophet: for so was the commandment of the Lord by his prophets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Steteruntque Levitæ tenentes organa David, et sacerdotes tubas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעַמְד֤וּ הַלְוִיִּם֙ בִּכְלֵ֣י דָוִ֔יד וְהַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים בַּחֲצֹצְרֽוֹת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the Levites stood, with the instruments of David, and the priests with trumpets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Leviläiset seisoivat Davidin harppuin kanssa ja papit basunain kanssa.
verses.king_james: And the Levites stood with the instruments of David, and the priests with the trumpets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et jussit Ezechias ut offerrent holocausta super altare : cumque offerrentur holocausta, cœperunt laudes canere Domino, et clangere tubis, atque in diversis organis quæ David rex Israël præparaverat, concrepare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ חִזְקִיָּ֔הוּ לְהַעֲל֥וֹת הָעֹלָ֖ה לְהַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וּבְעֵ֞ת הֵחֵ֣ל הָעוֹלָ֗ה הֵחֵ֤ל שִׁיר־יְהֹוָה֙ וְהַחֲצֹ֣צְר֔וֹת וְעַ֨ל־יְדֵ֔י כְּלֵ֖י דָּוִ֥יד מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias commanded that they should offer holocausts upon the altar: and when the holocausts were offered, they began to sing praises to the Lord, and to sound with trumpets, and divers instruments which David the king of Israel had prepared.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jehiskia käski heidän uhrata polttouhria alttarilla. Ja ruvetessa uhraamaan polttouhria, ruvettiin myös veisaamaan Herralle basunilla ja moninaisilla Davidin Israelin kuninkaan kanteleilla.
verses.king_james: And Hezekiah commanded to offer the burnt offering upon the altar. And when the burnt offering began, the song of the Lord began also with the trumpets, and with the instruments ordained by David king of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omni autem turba adorante, cantores, et ii qui tenebant tubas, erant in officio suo donec compleretur holocaustum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־הַקָּהָל֙ מִֽשְׁתַּחֲוִ֔ים וְהַשִּׁ֣יר מְשׁוֹרֵ֔ר וְהַחֲצֹצְר֖וֹת (מחצצרים) [מַחְצְרִ֑ים] הַכֹּ֕ל עַ֖ד לִכְל֥וֹת הָעֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the multitude adored, and the singers, and the trumpeters, were in their office till the holocaust was finished.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koko seurakunta kumarsi. Ja veisaajain veisuu ja basunan soittajain ääni kuului, siihenasti että kaikki polttouhri täytettiin.
verses.king_james: And all the congregation worshipped, and the singers sang, and the trumpeters sounded: and all this continued until the burnt offering was finished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque finita esset oblatio, incurvatus est rex, et omnes qui erant cum eo, et adoraverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְכַלּ֖וֹת לְהַעֲל֑וֹת כָּֽרְע֗וּ הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ וְכׇֽל־הַנִּמְצְאִ֥ים אִתּ֖וֹ וַיִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the oblation was ended, the king, and all that were with him bowed down and adored.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska polttouhri uhrattu oli, notkisti kuningas ja kaikki ne, jotka hänen kanssansa olivat, polviansa ja kumarsivat.
verses.king_james: And when they had made an end of offering, the king and all that were present with him bowed themselves, and worshipped.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepitque Ezechias et principes Levitis, ut laudarent Dominum sermonibus David, et Asaph videntis : qui laudaverunt eum magna lætitia, et incurvato genu adoraverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יֹּ֠אמֶר יְחִזְקִיָּ֨הוּ הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ וְהַשָּׂרִים֙ לַלְוִיִּ֔ם לְהַלֵּל֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה בְּדִבְרֵ֥י דָוִ֖יד וְאָסָ֣ף הַחֹזֶ֑ה וַֽיְהַלְלוּ֙ עַד־לְשִׂמְחָ֔ה וַֽיִּקְּד֖וּ וַיִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוֽוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias and the princes commanded the Levites to praise the Lord with the words of David, and Asaph the seer: and they praised him with great joy, and bowing the knee adored.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Jehiskia ja kaikki ylimmäiset käskivät Leviläisten kiittää Herraa Davidin ja näkiän Asaphin sanoilla. Ja kiittivät häntä suurella ilolla, ja kallistivat päätänsä ja kumarsivat.
verses.king_james: Moreover Hezekiah the king and the princes commanded the Levites to sing praise unto the Lord with the words of David, and of Asaph the seer. And they sang praises with gladness, and they bowed their heads and worshipped.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ezechias autem etiam hæc addidit : Implestis manus vestras Domino : accedite, et offerte victimas et laudes in domo Domini. Obtulit ergo universa multitudo hostias, et laudes, et holocausta, mente devota.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַן יְחִזְקִיָּ֜הוּ וַיֹּ֗אמֶר עַתָּה֙ מִלֵּאתֶ֤ם יֶדְכֶם֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה גֹּ֧שׁוּ וְהָבִ֛יאוּ זְבָחִ֥ים וְתוֹד֖וֹת לְבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיָּבִ֤יאוּ הַקָּהָל֙ זְבָחִ֣ים וְתוֹד֔וֹת וְכׇל־נְדִ֥יב לֵ֖ב עֹלֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias added, and said: You have filled your hands to the Lord, come and offer victims, and praises in the house of the Lord. And all the multitude offered victims, and praises, and holocausts with a devout mind.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jehiskia vastaten sanoi: nyt te olette täyttäneet kätenne Herralle, käykäät ja kantakaat uhria ja kiitosuhria Herran huoneesen. Ja seurakunta vei uhria ja kiitosuhria, ja jokainen hyväntahtoinen sydämestä polttouhria.
verses.king_james: Then Hezekiah answered and said, Now ye have consecrated yourselves unto the Lord, come near and bring sacrifices and thank offerings into the house of the Lord. And the congregation brought in sacrifices and thank offerings; and as many as were of a free heart burnt offerings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro numerus holocaustorum quæ obtulit multitudo, hic fuit : tauros septuaginta, arietes centum, agnos ducentos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֞י מִסְפַּ֣ר הָעֹלָה֮ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֵבִ֣יאוּ הַקָּהָל֒ בָּקָ֣ר שִׁבְעִ֔ים אֵילִ֥ים מֵאָ֖ה כְּבָשִׂ֣ים מָאתָ֑יִם לְעֹלָ֥ה לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה כׇּל־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the number of the holocausts which the multitude offered, was seventy bullocks, a hundred rams, and two hundred lambs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja polttouhrin luku, jonka seurakunta vei, oli seitsemänkymmentä härkää, sata oinasta ja kaksisataa karitsaa; ja nämät kaikki veivät he polttouhriksi Herralle.
verses.king_james: And the number of the burnt offerings, which the congregation brought, was threescore and ten bullocks, an hundred rams, and two hundred lambs: all these were for a burnt offering to the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sanctificaveruntque Domino boves sexcentos, et oves tria millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהַקֳּדָשִׁ֑ים בָּקָר֙ שֵׁ֣שׁ מֵא֔וֹת וְצֹ֖אן שְׁלֹ֥שֶׁת אֲלָפִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they consecrated to the Lord six hundred oxen, and three thousand sheep.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he pyhittivät kuusisataa härkää ja kolmetuhatta lammasta.
verses.king_james: And the consecrated things were six hundred oxen and three thousand sheep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes vero pauci erant, nec poterant sufficere ut pelles holocaustorum detraherent : unde et Levitæ fratres eorum adjuverunt eos, donec impleretur opus, et sanctificarentur antistites : Levitæ quippe faciliori ritu sanctificantur quam sacerdotes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֤ק הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ הָי֣וּ לִמְעָ֔ט וְלֹ֣א יָכְל֔וּ לְהַפְשִׁ֖יט אֶת־כׇּל־הָעֹל֑וֹת וַֽיְחַזְּק֞וּם אֲחֵיהֶ֣ם הַלְוִיִּ֗ם עַד־כְּל֤וֹת הַמְּלָאכָה֙ וְעַ֣ד יִתְקַדְּשׁ֣וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֔ים כִּ֤י הַלְוִיִּם֙ יִשְׁרֵ֣י לֵבָ֔ב לְהִתְקַדֵּ֖שׁ מֵהַכֹּהֲנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the priests were few, and were not enough to flay the holocausts: wherefore the Levites their brethren helped them, till the work was ended, and priests were sanctified, for the Levites are sanctified with an easier rite than the priests.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan pappeja oli vähimmäksi, niin ettei he voineet ottaa pois vuotia kaikilta polttouhreilta, sentähden auttivat heitä heidän veljensä Leviläiset, siihenasti että työ täytettiin ja niin kauvan kuin papit pyhittivät itsiänsä; sillä Leviläiset olivat vireämmät pyhittämässä itsiänsä kuin papit.
verses.king_james: But the priests were too few, so that they could not flay all the burnt offerings: wherefore their brethren the Levites did help them, till the work was ended, and until the other priests had sanctified themselves: for the Levites were more upright in heart to sanctify themselves than the priests.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt ergo holocausta plurima, adipes pacificorum, et libamina holocaustorum : et completus est cultus domus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־עֹלָ֨ה לָרֹ֜ב בְּחֶלְבֵ֧י הַשְּׁלָמִ֛ים וּבַנְּסָכִ֖ים לָֽעֹלָ֑ה וַתִּכּ֖וֹן עֲבוֹדַ֥ת בֵּית־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So there were many holocausts, and the fat of peace offerings, and the libations of holocausts: and the service of the house of the Lord was completed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja polttouhria oli paljo kiitosuhrin lihavuuden kanssa, ja juomauhria polttouhriksi. Näin virka valmistettiin Herran huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And also the burnt offerings were in abundance, with the fat of the peace offerings, and the drink offerings for every burnt offering. So the service of the house of the Lord was set in order.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætatusque est Ezechias et omnis populus, eo quod ministerium Domini esset expletum : de repente quippe hoc fieri placuerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׂמַ֤ח יְחִזְקִיָּ֙הוּ֙ וְכׇל־הָעָ֔ם עַ֛ל הַהֵכִ֥ין הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים לָעָ֑ם כִּ֥י בְּפִתְאֹ֖ם הָיָ֥ה הַדָּבָֽר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias, and all the people rejoiced because the ministry of the Lord was accomplished. For the resolution of doing this thing was taken suddenly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jehiskia riemuitsi ja kaikki kansa siitä, mitä Jumala oli kansalle valmistanut; sillä se tapahtui sangen kiiruusti.
verses.king_james: And Hezekiah rejoiced, and all the people, that God had prepared the people: for the thing was done suddenly.
